from pydantic import BaseModel
from sqlalchemy.orm import Session


class CreateUserRequest(BaseModel):
    email: str
    name: str
    role: str = "user"


class UserRepository:
    def __init__(self, session: Session):
        self.session = session

    def create_user(self, request: CreateUserRequest):
        user = User(email=request.email, name=request.name, role=request.role)
        self.session.add(user)
        self.session.commit()
        return user

    def find_by_email(self, request: CreateUserRequest):
        return self.session.query(User).filter_by(email=request.email).first()
